context: Current State (updated): We care about sustainability and want to reduce meat somewhat while keeping food prep simple. Realistic ways to cut waste and keep variety include a simple planning framework, a few reliable swaps, and small changes to how you buy and store food. Strategies: phased meat reduction (start with 2 meat-reduced dinners per week, not full vegetarian); stretch meat by mixing cooked lentils or beans into ground-meat sauces,
